title: barleria polhillii subsp. polhillii
intro: Barleria polhillii subsp. polhillii, also known as the 'Purple Fountain Plant', is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Africa, for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Barleria polhillii subsp. polhillii include the treatment of fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent infection. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions made by boiling the leaves in water, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
